job_title: Graduate Engineer, Design Automation, Front-End & AI Driven Methodologies
job_description:
• With a mid-year, and year-end review you'll have two windows each year to progress recognizing the pace at which you could grow.
• Join our Graduate Committee and home in on your planning, networking and co-ordination skills.
• A yearly occurrence exclusive for Graduates allowing you to hear from executive members, inspiring speakers and make connections for life.
• Arm is owning the vision to unlock a broad ecosystem of silicon required for AI, data centers, mobile, compute, and IoT.
• Have strong programming skills in Python, C++, Ruby, Go and general scripting.
• Possess experience in data analytics, dashboarding, and workflow automation.
• Strong problem-solving skills, analytical approach, and attention to detail.
• Attend our "Grad-teach-Grads" workshops, guest speaker series and various social events to expand your knowledge.

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to meet software engineering requirements.
• In this role, you will play a key part in defining software requirements, designing embedded solutions, and verifying system performance, ensuring our maintenance systems meet the evolving needs of modern aircraft.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to meet software engineering requirements.
• You’ll bridge engineering and IT to ensure complex aerospace development ecosystems perform at scale, meet rigorous standards, and align with regulatory and export‑controlled requirements.
• This position is ideal for engineers experienced in modern software development methodologies, debugging, and performance optimization, who thrive in highly technical, cross‑functional environments.
